description_long: This is a cylindrical beverage can with a bright red exterior, featuring a large, colorful Fanta logo prominently displayed on the front. The can is made of metal, likely aluminum, with a glossy finish that reflects light. The label includes green and yellow fruit graphics, possibly representing a kiwi or lime flavor, and white text on a blue background. The back of the can displays nutritional information and other product details in white text against the red background. The top of the can is metallic and open, lacking a visible pull tab or cap. The overall appearance is typical of a commercial soft drink can, designed to be eye-catching and easily recognizable.
description: A red, glossy Fanta beverage can with fruit graphics and prominent branding, made of metal. The can features detailed labeling and a metallic open top.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the Fanta logo, fruit graphics, and part of the label.
description_view_1: Direct front view with the Fanta logo and fruit graphics most clearly visible.
description_view_2: Right side view showing the edge of the logo and the start of the nutritional information.
description_view_3: Back view displaying mostly nutritional information and product details in white text.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large Fanta logo in white and blue with green and yellow fruit graphics on a red background; additional white text and product details on the back.
